user_feedback: when the game is paused, I dont want to see paused press ESC to resume, and I don't want the game to be grayed out, but I also don't want the HUD to be hidden,
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD (score, lives, coins, level, etc.) is not being displayed. The PAUSED case in ui.js has an empty block that only clears the canvas, leaving no UI elements visible.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Copy the HUD rendering code from the PLAYING state into the PAUSED state so that the same game stats are visible when paused, without any overlay or pause text.
